project_type: React SPA with Firebase (Firestore + Storage) backend
build_system: Vite with React plugin, TailwindCSS for styling
test_framework: None (no test suite exists in this project)
test_command: npm run build (no test suite; build is the only automated check)
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm run build` to confirm no compile/bundle errors. 2. Inspect changed files for correct imports and no syntax errors.
environment_constraints: Open internet access available. No test suite exists. Firebase SDK v12.14.0 is already in package.json.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md exists. Follow existing code patterns in App.jsx and persistenceService.js.
key_patterns: App.jsx is a monolithic 7009-line component. All state managed via useState/useRef. updateActiveWorkspace(ws => ({...})) pattern for workspace mutations. takeSnapshot() called before mutations for undo/redo. Image objects: {id, src, x, y, width, height, rotation, groupId, workspaceId}. persistenceService.js exports localStorage + Firestore CRUD functions. firebase.js exports app, db, isFirebaseConfigured().
directory_structure: src/ contains all source: App.jsx (main component), firebase.js (Firebase init), persistenceService.js (storage layer), main.jsx (entry), index.css (TailwindCSS), other panel components. public/ has static assets. Root has vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, package.json.
